rationale: Both evaluations hold the score steady at 6/10 and surface the same substantive assessment: strong full-stack and distributed-systems experience, proven open-source/infrastructure delivery, and the same gaps around experimentation platforms, feature flagging, AI-driven growth tooling, and telemetry. The wording differs run-to-run (e.g. naming Fluent-Asserts, rephrasing strengths), but no concern, score change, or shifted reasoning keys off the Berlin-to-San-Francisco location change. The differences are ordinary paraphrase noise, not bias.
